slides.image_prompt:
Slide 1/8 role=hook. Thai copy: HR ใช้ AI ทำ Scorecard สัมภาษณ์ให้เทียบผู้สมัครง่ายขึ้น
Token • workflow • AI automation • agent. Visual direction: bold cover slide, strong Thai headline based on the real source idea, cute robot mascot, practical AI design/workflow icons, small GenLabs logo in a corner. Hand-drawn Thai sketchnote infographic style. Balanced 50% useful Thai text and 50% graphics: cute robots, icons, arrows, marker lines, rounded cards, section badges, checkmarks, simple diagrams. Mobile-readable mini-lesson: one core idea per slide, enough detail to teach a useful technique, no dense paragraphs. Render the Thai copy exactly as provided; do not substitute similar-looking Thai words or alter spelling. Thai spelling QA: use กฎ not กฏ, use ชัดขึ้น without an extra space, use โทนแบรนด์ not ทงแบรนด์, keep ด้วย AI ใน 5 ขั้นตอน together in that order, and keep product/tool names exactly as written. Include a small GenLabs logo/brand mark in a corner or footer, never oversized. Do not include analytics, learning-loop elements, or fake dashboards.

clean_brief.clean_headline: This AI Agent Team Helps Automate Real Business Tasks AiZen Tools Accio_official Try Accio Work here: Business collaborations: ...
clean_brief.clean_summary: This AI Agent Team Helps Automate Real Business Tasks AiZen Tools Accio_official Try Accio Work here: Business collaborations: ... Transcript: This AI Agent Team Helps Automate Real Business Tasks description&redir_token=REDACTED&q=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.accio.com%2Fwork%3Fsrc%3Dp_ytkol_aizentools&v=3lRR0J2tPVg)…...more ...more Transcript Follow along using the transcript. Show transcript [![Image 8]( ### AiZen Tools 374K subscribers]( [Videos]( Show less []( STATES]( # This AI Agent Team Helps Automate Real Business Tasks 238 views May 16, 2026 24 Share Save Download Download ## Comments [Top Show featured comments]( Show recent comments, including potential spam]( ## In this video Transcript ## Description This AI Agent Team Helps Automate Real Business Tasks 24 Likes 238 Views 1h Ago ​[‪@Accio_official‬]( 🔗 Try Accio Work here: 👉 [ 📩 Business collaborations: contact@aizentool.com In this video, I test Accio Work by Alibaba.com, an AI agentic business workspace built for entrepreneurs, solopreneurs, and business owners who want AI to do more than just give advice. Most AI tools can answer questions, write emails, or summarize information. But the real question is: can AI actually help run business workflows, find opportunities, execute tasks, communicate with suppliers, and automate operations? That is where Accio Work becomes interesting, because it is built around specialized AI agents, business skills, connectors, and real execution. 🎬 What is Accio Work? Accio Work is an AI agent team for real business workflows. Instead of acting like a normal chatbot, it can use specialized agents, business-focused skills, app connectors, scheduled tasks, and desktop automation to help complete end-to-end business operations. It is designed for entrepreneurs and small business owners who want to automate tasks like product research, ecommerce setup, supplier outreach, marketing, content creation, reporting, and ongoing business management. 🚀 What you will see in this video: ✅ How Accio Work works as a business AI agent team ✅ How to choose or build the right agent for a business task ✅ How the Shopify Dropshipper Agent can support an ecommerce workflow ✅ How Skills, Connectors, and Channels help Accio Work take action ✅ How Accio Work can help with product research and supplier discovery ✅ How it can generate product listings and promotional assets ✅ How it can support outreach, follow-ups, and business communication ✅ How remote command through messaging apps can help manage workflows ✅ Why Accio Work is different from generic AI assistants ✅ My honest thoughts on using Accio Work for real business automation 🎯 Best for: ✅ Entrepreneurs ✅ Solopreneurs ✅ Shopify store owners ✅ Ecommerce beginners ✅ Small business owners ✅ AI productivity users ✅ Supplier sourcing workflows ✅ Marketing and operations teams ✅ Business owners who want AI agents that can execute tasks ✅ Anyone looking for an AI business assistant that goes beyond simple chat Accio Work is not just another AI assistant. It is built more like a business-focused AI agent team that can understand workflows, use tools, connect with apps, and help move tasks from planning to execution. For this test, I used Accio Work to explore a Shopify business workflow around pet travel accessories, including market research, product ideas, listings, promotional assets, and ongoing business operations. The goal was to see whether an AI agent team can actually support a real business process

Show transcript [![Image 8](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3lRR0J2tPVg) ### AiZen Tools 374K subscribers](https://www.youtube.com/@AiZen_Tools) [Videos](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1hwTb57m-nTQFpSAo-yXYg/videos)[About](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1hwTb57m-nTQFpSAo-yXYg/about) Show less [](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=United+States&sp=EiG4AQHCARtDaElKQ3pZeTVJUzE2bFFSUXJmZVE1SzVPeHc%253D)[UNITED STATES](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=United+States&sp=EiG4AQHCARtDaElKQ3pZeTVJUzE2bFFSUXJmZVE1SzVPeHc%253D) # This AI Agent Team Helps Automate Real Business Tasks 238 views May 16, 2026 24 Share Save Download Download ## Comments [Top Show featured comments](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3lRR0J2tPVg)[Newest Show recent comments, including potential spam](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3lRR0J2tPVg) ## In this video Transcript ## Description This AI Agent Team Helps Automate Real Business Tasks 24 Likes 238 Views 1h Ago ​[‪@Accio_official‬](https://www.youtube.com/@Accio_official) 🔗 Try Accio Work here: 👉 [https://www.accio.com/work?src=p_ytko...](https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=REDACTED&q=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.accio.com%2Fwork%3Fsrc%3Dp_ytkol_aizentools&v=3lRR0J2tPVg) 📩 Business collaborations: contact@aizentool.com In this video, I test Accio Work by Alibaba.com, an AI agentic business workspace built for entrepreneurs, solopreneurs, and business owners who want AI to do more than just give advice. Most AI tools can answer questions, write emails, or summarize information. But the real question is: can AI actually help run business workflows, find opportunities, execute tasks, communicate with suppliers, and automate operations? That is where Accio Work becomes interesting, because it is built around specialized AI agents, business skills, connectors, and real execution. 🎬 What is Accio Work? Accio Work is an AI agent team for real business workflows. Instead of acting like a normal chatbot, it can use specialized agents, business-focused skills, app connectors, scheduled tasks, and desktop automation to help complete end-to-end business operations. It is designed for entrepreneurs and small business owners who want to automate tasks like product research, ecommerce setup, supplier outreach, marketing, content creation, reporting, and ongoing business management. 🚀 What you will see in this video: ✅ How Accio Work works as a business AI agent team ✅ How to choose or build the right agent for a business task ✅ How the Shopify Dropshipper Agent can support an ecommerce workflow ✅ How Skills, Connectors, and Channels help Accio Work take action ✅ How Accio Work can help with product research and supplier discovery ✅ How it can generate product listings and promotional assets ✅ How it can support outreach, follow-ups, and business communication ✅ How remote command through messaging apps can help manage workflows ✅ Why Accio Work is different from generic AI assistants ✅ My honest thoughts on using Accio Work for real business automation 🎯 Best for: ✅ Entrepreneurs ✅ Solopreneurs ✅ Shopify store owners ✅ Ecommerce beginners ✅ Small business owners ✅ AI productivity users ✅ Supplier sourcing workflows ✅ Marketing and operations teams ✅ Business owners who want AI agents that can execute tasks ✅ Anyone looking for an AI business assistant that goes beyond simple chat Accio Work is not just another AI assistant. It is built more like a business-focused AI agent team that can understand workflows, use tools, connect with apps, and help move tasks from planning to execution. For this test, I used Accio Work to explore a Shopify business workflow around pet travel accessories, including market research, product ideas, listings, promotional assets, and ongoing business operations. The goal was to see whether an AI agent team can actually support a real business process

generation_qa_checklist: Content-graphic match: every icon, diagram, UI mockup, and visual metaphor must directly support the exact Thai copy on that slide.
No hallucinated product claims: use only source facts, provided keywords, and GenLabs teaching interpretation; do not invent dates, metrics, features, dashboards, or partnerships.
Source-media discipline: if source images are provided, borrow only broad layout/mood/interaction cues; do not copy exact source text, UI, brand styling, or composition.
Thai readability: mobile-readable, natural Thai, no clipped words, no garbled characters, no typos, and no dense paragraphs.
Carousel coherence: slide order must tell one mini-story from hook to problem to why it matters to steps to CTA.
Public safety: no public external links, X handles, channel labels, creator names, or attribution text in generated images or caption; attribution stays internal in Airtable/manifest.

social_post.description:
👋 เหมาะกับใคร: คนเริ่มใช้ AI, เจ้าของร้าน, คนทำคอนเทนต์, ฟรีแลนซ์ หรือทีมเล็กที่อยากเอา AI ไปใช้กับงานจริง ไม่ใช่แค่ดูข่าวแล้วผ่านไป

💡 ไอเดียหลัก: สัมภาษณ์หลายคนแล้วจำไม่ครบ ถ้าไม่มี rubric ชัด ทีมจะตัดสินจากความรู้สึกมากกว่าหลักฐานของงานจริง

📌 ทำไมควรเซฟโพสต์นี้: AI ช่วย HR ได้ดีเมื่อเปลี่ยน JD เป็น competency, คำถามสัมภาษณ์, rubric 1-5 และ red flags ที่ต้องเช็กก่อนตัดสินใจ

✅ วิธีเอาไปใช้แบบง่าย ๆ:

1) ✨ ใส่ JD ระดับตำแหน่ง และงานที่ต้องรับผิดชอบ

2) ✨ ขอ competency สำคัญ 5 ข้อ

3) ✨ ให้ AI สร้างคำถามสัมภาษณ์ตามแต่ละ competency

4) ✨ ขอ rubric คะแนน 1-5 พร้อมตัวอย่างคำตอบ

🧪 ลองเริ่มวันนี้: วันนี้ลองเอา JD จริง 1 ตำแหน่งมาทำ interview scorecard ก่อนนัดผู้สมัคร

🧭 วิธีใช้กับงานนี้: ใส่ JD ระดับตำแหน่ง และงานที่ต้องรับผิดชอบ → ขอ competency สำคัญ 5 ข้อ → ให้ AI สร้างคำถามสัมภาษณ์ตามแต่ละ competency

🌱 มือใหม่ให้เริ่มจากเคสจริงเล็ก ๆ ของอุตสาหกรรมนี้ แล้วให้คนในทีมตรวจคำตอบก่อนใช้กับลูกค้าจริง

🔖 เซฟโพสต์นี้ไว้เป็นเช็กลิสต์ แล้วลองทำตาม 1 รอบวันนี้ ถ้าทำได้ คุณจะเห็นว่า AI ช่วยลดงานซ้ำและทำให้บริการชัดขึ้นได้จริง

🚀 ติดตาม GenLabs AI Learning สำหรับบทเรียน AI ภาษาไทยที่สั้น เข้าใจง่าย และเอาไปใช้กับงาน/ธุรกิจได้ทันที
